title: eragrostis poculiformis
intro: Eragrostis poculiformis, also known as Needle Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eragrostis poculiformis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make topical applications or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
